subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Thy days when thou didst abide beneath the shade of the blessed Lote-Tree are remembered in the presence of the Branch [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد ایامت که در ظل سدره مبارکه ماوی داشتی لدی الوجه مذکور حضرت غصن
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat], @thankfulness; gratitude, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @consolation and comfort
